{{Quote|Your mastery of the Force is not as strong as some of us, but your devotion is second to none.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Tekli''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]], who was apprenticed to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Cilghal]]. She was among the most skilled [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healers]] in the Order and served during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. Later, Tekli was a member of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] covert group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] known as [[Darkmeld]], which actively worked against [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s attempts to take control of the Jedi Order.

==Biography==
===The Yuuzhan Vong War===
[[File:Tekli.jpg|thumb|left|Tekli during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].]]

After the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]], Tekli assisted her master in the [[Eclipse (Deep Core)/Legends|Eclipse]] Project and in helping form the [[Great River]].

While not as strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in her class, she was one of seventeen Jedi members on the [[Myrkr strike team]], and was instrumental in keeping the team alive through her healing techniques. She survived the mission, and was made an official [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in a ceremony on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] some four years into the conflict. Thereafter, she was part of the team that went to search for the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. During that journey, it was Tekli's healing abilities that helped save [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] life following the [[Battle of Bastion]]. During her trip on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] task force to find Zonama Sekot, Tekli developed an ability which allowed her to read someone's life signs through the Force, enhancing both her healing prowess and her abilities as a Jedi.

During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], Tekli was one of many Jedi who defended the world from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] and the [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]] bioweapon. After the war, Tekli opted to stay on Zonama Sekot, where she eventually became a [[Magister]]-in-training.

===The Dark Nest===
In [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], Tekli and the other surviving members of the Myrkr strike team disappeared into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] to investigate a mysterious summoning through the Force. This summoning led them to aid a species known as [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] who had found themselves embroiled in a border dispute with the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]. In addition, prolonged exposure to the Killik's caused one to become a [[Joiner]], as it did to the former members of the strike team.

When Luke Skywalker and company found the group, they were tested by Cilghal in the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] to determine what was causing the Jedi Knights to act as [[Joiner]]s. Tekli later attended the [[Conclave on Ossus]] where she decided to stay a Jedi. Tekli, [[Tesar Sebatyne]] and [[Lowbacca]] were Joiners much like [[Zekk]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], but not to the extent that they could read each others thoughts and feel the others emotions.

She along with [[Tesar Sebatyne]] and [[Lowbacca]] were exiled to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] to [[Meditation/Legends|meditate]] on their actions regarding [[Raynar Thul]], who at the time was known as UnuThul and still thought dead by his mother, [[Aryn Dro Thul]]. They overheard the Masters discussing battle tactics, one of those being [[Assassin/Legends|assassinating]] Raynar. Upon discovering that Aryn Thul possessed the [[R2-0|only droid left]] that could fix [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], they went to inform her of both her son's survival and the assassination plan.
When [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his wife, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], went to to buy the droid that would fix Artoo, they were both shocked and outraged that any Jedi would divluge such information. However, the two kept their calm, and Aryn Dro Thul agreed to give them the droid if they promised to do everything within their power not to kill her son. It is unknown how long the three were made to stay on the planet, but the were back in time to help finish the three way war between the Killiks, Chiss, and Galactic Alliance. Later, she was on board the ''[[Megador]]'' with her former Master during the attack on the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]].

[[File:RobinPronovost-Tekli.jpg|thumb|Right|Jedi Knight Tekli.]]
Unlike [[Zekk]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], Tekli was only partially affected by her exposure to the Killiks, and while she sympathized with their cause, she did not come into conflict with the [[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)|Masters' Council]] to the extent they did.

===Political tensions===
In [[43 ABY|43.5 ABY]], the relationship of the Jedi Order and the Galactic Alliance reached a breaking point. [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Natasi Daala]], who achieved power following the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], fostered an anti-Jedi sentiment which culminated in the arrest of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] Luke Skywalker; who was then exiled and replaced by [[Kenth Hamner]].

Tekli disapproved of Daala's blatant bid to take control of the Order, and as such, joined Jaina Solo's covert group, [[Darkmeld]], which sought to undermine the Chief of State's efforts. In this capacity, she helped to alert the group to [[Seff Hellin]]'s plan to free [[Valin Horn]] from prison. This led to the Darkmeld members [[Raid on the Armand Isard Correctional Facility|capturing him]] and beginning the process of studying the strange [[Force psychosis|Force disease]] that plagued him, in the hopes of discovering a cure.

Following the apprehension of [[Natua Wan]] at the [[Coruscant Livestock Exchange and Exhibition]] by the Solos and fellow Jedi Knight [[Radd Minker]], a report by [[Javis Tyrr]] revealed that the New Jedi Order had secretly been keeping Seff Hellin locked up in the lower levels of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Infuriated, Daala issued a series of demands to acting Grand Master Kenth Hamner, who had no knowledge of Hellin's presence inside the Temple. As part of the deal struck between Daala and Hamner, the Jedi conspirators of Darkmeld were unveiled and punished, including Tekli, who was forced to give a live interview discussing her role in the incident.

Shortly after that, Tekli took a human male named [[Josat]] as her Padawan. He worked as a nurse for her while working on his force healing abilities. She would assign physical conditioning (such as running laps) as punishment for failure to learn his assignments.

[[File:Jk-tekli.jpg|thumb|200px|Tekli]]
Tekli's Padawan [[Josat]] was assigned to see if the [[Horn/Legends|Horn]] Jedi were in fact cured of their [[Force psychosis]], he talked and talked through the whole testing that the Jedi were going under, he'd ask a question the tell them not to answer. He did a good job.

===Jedi Leaving Coruscant===
Tekli was one of the Jedi that left [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] order, they retreated to their secret base somewhere and began learning how to fool the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who had taken over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

===Liberation of Coruscant===
Tekli went with [[Raynar Thul]] and [[Lowbacca]] to find the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[Thuruht]] nest to find out more about [[Abeloth]].

After the Sith were dealt with the [[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senate]] asked [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|The New Jedi Order]] to leave [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and after a meeting with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] they agreed to leave but said they would always be willing to help.

===Preparing to leave===
It took almost three months to move the entire [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and moved it to their secret base on [[Shedu Maad]].

===Leaving Coruscant===
Tekli was in attendance of the [[Wedding of Jagged Fel and Jaina Solo]].
